title: Add predict_proba and predict_log_proba to classifiers missing them (LDA, QDA, RidgeClassifier, LogRegCV, SGDClassifier, LinearSVC)
description:
sklearn ClassifierMixin requires predict_proba / predict_log_proba. ferrolearn-linear currently has predict_proba only on FittedLogisticRegression and FittedMLPClassifier.

Affected:
- FittedLDA: discriminant scores → softmax → probabilities
- FittedQDA: same pattern with quadratic discriminant
- FittedRidgeClassifier: project decision_function through softmax (sklearn uses one-vs-rest decision function)
- FittedLogisticRegressionCV: trivially same as LogisticRegression
- FittedSGDClassifier (only when loss='log_loss' or 'modified_huber'): conditional support
- FittedLinearSVC: not in sklearn (LinearSVC has no predict_proba); skip

Also add predict_log_proba to LogisticRegression + MLPClassifier (currently missing) and to all the new classifiers above. Use shared log_proba helper from lib.rs (mirror ferrolearn-tree pattern).
